text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Kikuka Sho, the race said to
determine the strongest Umamusume, and
Symboli Rudolf is the picture of composure.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is one crown she will not give up. We step
forward, our sights set higher than ever.
